feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Husband In Arms
entry.summary:
Author: ReaperGrim317

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,300Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Evan Buckley joined the Navy at 18.Eddie Diaz joined the Army at 18.They joined one year apart.One to escape. One to provide for his son.Each joined the military at different times for different reasons. But when they meet on deployment what will happen? A Navy SEAL and an Army Medic… nothing bad could happen at all.Read on to find out what happens when they meet at 20 and 19 years old.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Eddie Diaz/Evan “Buck” Buckley
  • Steve McGarrett/Danny "Danno" Williams

entry.title: He’s Bleeding Out (I’m Hard Over It)
entry.summary:
Author: Cosybookworm

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,841Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: Eddie Diaz makes slutty whimpers when he’s been stabbed as it turns out. And Buck can’t think about anything else.

entry.title: Second Chances
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 841,865Chapters: 86/?Kudos: 125

Summary: Bobby and Athena are just two people trying to put their lives back together while figuring out how to co-parent. What starts as a complicated plan to foster kids in need slowly turns into something much deeper. Through the ups and downs of heartbreak, healing, and raising children who’ve been through so much, they find strength in each other. Over time, their partnership grows into love, and together, they build a story about family, trust, and second chances.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Evergrowing
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 615,287Chapters: 79/?Kudos: 34

Summary: Athena and Bobby are learning that parenting doesn’t end when the kids turn eighteen. With three grown children and two still at home, Bobby and Athena find themselves navigating new challenges at every stage of life. Each child carries their own struggles, some spoken and some hidden, but together the family works through the ups and downs with love, patience, and resilience. At the heart of it all, they’re reminded that family is a bond that grows, shifts, and deepens, no matter how old the kids get.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Otherside
entry.summary:
Author: Olivia_1920o6

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,297Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 93

Summary: After the lawsuit, Buck drifts a little. Or maybe it was before that. Maybe it it was even before the truck bombing. Maybe it was before he ever left home. And not the kind of drifting where he's lost. The kind where he can blink and its been a week. The kind where he can go days without showering or eating or working out without even realizing. The kind where sometimes he sleeps for 24 hours and other times he sleeps for 2. The kind where he can't focus on thinking most of the time, but when he does it hurts and spirals and bites. The kind where he just wants to be alone, but knows he doesn't want to feel lonely. The kind where he pulls away and folds himself up until he can disappear.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: It Wasn’t Just a Hookup
entry.summary:
Author: AstraeaXAccalia

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,184Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 73

Summary: There’s weight across him, an arm draped loosely but firmly over his torso, the faint, steady rhythm of someone else’s breathing brushing against his skin. Skin against skin. No barrier, no layers, nothing between them except heat and contact.  Why is Eddie... Oh my god. Or Buck wakes up hungover in a hotel room after Chim’s bachelor party, realizes he and Eddie had a very real hookup… and immediately spirals into panic because now he’s convinced Eddie was just drunk and he’s single-handedly ruined their entire relationship.

entry.title: I need you like I need water
entry.summary:
Author: moodlight

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,000Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 17

Summary: After a devastating apartment fire leaves Buck trapped beneath the wreckage, Eddie is the one who comes back for him—because of course he does. What starts as another near-death experience turns into something far more terrifying: Buck realizing he’s hopelessly in love with his best friend. As panic attacks, old wounds, and buried feelings rise to the surface, Buck begins to understand that Eddie has been choosing him all along. — Inspired by a song by Lost Stars called Water

entry.title: The art of being passive aggressive - A Christopher Diaz story
entry.summary:
Author: Magical_berries

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,826Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 39

Summary: The problem was that apparently Eddie had difficulties being honest to both the people around him and himself. He must've gotten so good at pretending that even he believed some of the lies he created. Like the fact that he was attracted to women and not hopelessly pining for his best friend.  Yes, Christopher had known this for a while. Even before he had left L.A. Somehow, he figured Eddie would realise it sooner or later but now it had been more than a year and his dad was still completely oblivious. And Christopher could not take it anymore. Not if he wanted to keep his sanity. or, Christopher Diaz is sick of watching Eddie and Buck be oblivious, so he takes matters into his own hands.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Drifting Away
entry.summary:
Author: Spacers24

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,666Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 514

Summary: Eddie saw the patient lying on the street, blood all around them. There's a few produce lying around and some broken beer can, looks like the patient was just done with grocery shopping when they got hit. It's only when he gets closer that he recognizes who the patient is.    His blood turns cold as he sees a broken and bloodied Buck lying on the ground.    “BUCK!!”  ===========Caught in an accident on his day off, Buck slips into a deep coma. The 118 is left reeling as Buck's life hangs in the balance, can they pull themselves together and will Buck ever wake up?

entry.title: Let It Happen
entry.summary:
Author: Cosybookworm

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,636Chapters: 12/12Kudos: 19

Summary: Eddie turned then. Their eyes met. And Buck....Buck forgot how to breathe for a second.Now Buck did in fact believe in curses, jinxes and signs from the universe. He believed stories were written in stars. He believed that someone's destiny could be pre-written before they even existed.So as Buck lost himself drowning in Eddie Diaz's chocolate brown eyes of warmth, he believed that this ethereal being had been created to meet Buck.And maybe Buck had been created to be a part of this man's life.   Or - Buck and Eddie both had trauma when it comes to love and yet they find themselves falling into a relationship without even realising it. Or maybe they do and they just don’t care.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Complete familly
entry.summary:
Author: Phantom__Void

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,404Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 35

Summary: “You ready?” Buck asked Eddie, squeezing his hand as tight as he could.“Ready as I'll ever be” Eddie smiled back, tears in his eyes not from any type of sadness but from an overwhelming amount of pride and happiness.orBuck and Eddie complete their little family

entry.title: My Dreams Are Just Dreams
entry.summary:
Author: Feybird395

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,095Chapters: 5/11Kudos: 80

Summary: Evan Buckley was nine years old the day he disappeared. It takes eleven years of hell to get the courage to escape the organisation that raised him. It'll take years more before he finally feels like a person again, for the ghosts of his past to stop haunting his every move. He becomes Buck, becomes a firefighter, finds a family, a sister, and two best friends. And then when he's thirty-one, Chris is taken. And if he wants to get him back, he'll need to face the past he thought he'd finally escaped. (OR: A Red Room, Assassin AU)

entry.title: But, You’re My Idiot
entry.summary:
Author: Writeninembers

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,850Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 206

Summary: It starts at the firefighter auction. With Buck on stage.With a smile Eddie can’t return.With a feeling he doesn’t understand—and refuses to name. Because it shouldn’t matter. It’s just Buck. Right? It would be easier if it was. Some lines don’t blur.Some lines were never even there. And some feelings? They don’t stay buried. No matter how hard they try.

entry.title: You Know That Guy?
entry.summary:
Author: Orchid_217

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,180Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 163

Summary: They have been very successful at hiding their relationship. While not everyone keeps up with boxing the name Eddie Diaz is known. Mostly from his appearance at the Olympics but a little from his modeling career on the side. Buck doesn’t seem too bothered by people drooling over his husband on random billboards and such. No one at the 118 was aware of Buck’s marital status and he planned to keep it that way. Or Eddie is a famous boxer and Buck is at the 118. Their marriage is private until the team finds out about Eddie during a random 12 hour shift. But this isn’t the first they’ve heard of Eddie Diaz.

entry.summary:
Author: moodlight

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 974Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

entry.title: Beat by Beat (Part by Part)
entry.summary:
Author: shanparkervarietyhour

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,182Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 277

Summary: Chris scooted closer to get a better look at it. “Theo, how come Buck and Dad are holding hands?”“What? We’re not -” He leaned in closer and, sure enough, Buck and Eddie’s respective blobs were connected by a single line.“Because they’re like Mommy and Daddy,” Theo explained as if it was the most obvious thing in the world. --- Theo draws a picture. Eddie panics.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley
  • Theo (9-1-1 TV)
  • Christopher Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Henrietta "Hen" Wilson
  • Fluff
  • Tooth-Rotting Fluff
  • Kid Fic
  • POV Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Eddie Diaz Loves Evan "Buck" Buckley
  • Feelings Realization

entry.title: Welcome to the Future
entry.summary:
Author: Forgotten_City

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,329Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: The thing was…Eddie could be petty. So when he discovered an opportunity to beat them at their own game, he took it, even if he was still wary of the smart appliance. He had planned to donate or sell the coffee maker, but, with no small amount of hesitation, he opened the box, skimming along the specs and instruction manual in a moment of morbid curiosity. AU in which Eddie keeps the Hildy, and learns a few things about himself in the process that only a smart device could teach him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
